features: Converted v3 app into a separate v4 marketplace foundation package using the new Supabase project
Added platform_admin and agency_admin marketplace roles while preserving client and guard roles
Added agency signup flow for licensed/certified security agencies
Added Platform Admin Agency Verification Center UI
Added Marketplace Jobs board UI for global open/accepted jobs
Added Marketplace Data Foundation dashboard to explain and verify the global backbone
Added marketplace_jobs table as the main source of truth for client request, agency acceptance, guard assignment, proof, reports, and future payments
Added job_events table as the global audit/timeline trail
Added agencies, agency_members, agency_service_areas, and marketplace_job_claims tables
Added indexes for job status, agency ownership, client, property, guard, proof, reports, and audit events
Added RPCs for platform admin bootstrap, agency signup, agency approval/rejection, client marketplace request creation, agency job acceptance, agency guard assignment, and global app data loading
Preserved v3.0.77 Recent Reports thumbnail fix, v3.0.76 Recent Reports polish, v3.0.75 audit trail UI, and v3.0.74 dashboard/report/proof sync
